# Let There Be

> Let There Be is a science marketing agency for healthcare and consumer-health brands. Since 2013 we have helped brands lead with scientific truth — pairing the Science Marketing Engine (a science-led strategy model) with the Science Studio (world-class video and animation production). Science leads; creativity makes it impossible to ignore.

## The Science Marketing Engine
- [Science Marketing Engine — overview](https://lettherebe.com/engine): The operating model where science leads strategy, creativity brings it to life, and the studio scales it everywhere.
- [Lit Review™](https://lettherebe.com/lit-review): A fast, strategic review of the science — mechanisms, white space, and where a brand can credibly win.
- [Claim Dev™](https://lettherebe.com/claim-dev): Substantiated, defensible, MLR-approvable claims tied directly to source studies.
- [Science Story™](https://lettherebe.com/science-story): A brand's evidence turned into ownable competitive advantage.

## The Science Studio
- [Science Studio — overview](https://lettherebe.com/studio): Cinematic science production — MOA videos, social, HCP education, retail, TV and digital advertising, and conference/sales videos.
- [MOA Moment™](https://lettherebe.com/moa-moment): Mechanism-of-action explained in seconds — clear, compelling, compliant.
- [Influencer Science Kit™](https://lettherebe.com/influencer-science-kit): Defensible, consumer-ready science language and visuals for creators.
- [Ad-to-Education Sequence™](https://lettherebe.com/ad-to-education): A 15-second ad earns the click; a 30-second education video earns the belief — on Amazon, Walmart, Chewy, and beyond.

## Company
- [Work & case studies](https://lettherebe.com/work): Results for Designs for Health, Cheers Health, iVIZIA, Nexium 24HR, Flonase, Lotrimin, Bausch + Lomb, and more.
- [About & team](https://lettherebe.com/about): Researchers, account managers, and animators — everyone here is fluent in science.
- [Contact](https://lettherebe.com/contact): Start a Science Story™.

## Trusted by
Bayer, Haleon, Kenvue, Opella, Karo Healthcare, Nestlé Health Science, Dr. Reddy's, and the CHPA.
